purpose: Systematically compare current conditions to historical episodes across multiple structural dimensions to identify closest analogues and inform scenario analysis
current_assessment: Current episode scores 6/8 match with 2006-07, the highest similarity. Key structural differences (swap lines, microstructure) suggest modern episodes are faster, sharper, shorter. Systematic and not cherry-picked per debate assessment.
limitations: Equal weighting of dimensions is an untested assumption
n=1 for each historical episode limits statistical inference
Post-2008 structural changes may invalidate pre-2008 analogues
